name: Tata Scholarship
description: One of India's most prestigious need-based scholarships for undergraduate students. Covers tuition, living expenses, and a personal development allowance. Aimed at academically strong students from financially disadvantaged backgrounds.
award: Up to INR 3,00,000/year covering tuition and living expenses

name: Aditya Birla Scholarship
description: Highly competitive merit-based scholarship for students at top institutes including IITs, IIMs, BITS, and select law/liberal arts colleges. Covers tuition and a monthly stipend. Awarded based on academic excellence and personal interview.

name: KVPY Fellowship (Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana)
provider: Department of Science and Technology (DST) / IISc
description: National fellowship program to encourage students with aptitude for research in basic sciences. Provides a monthly fellowship and summer research exposure at top science institutions. Requires clearing a national aptitude test.

name: Aga Khan Foundation International Scholarship
description: Provides support to outstanding students from developing countries for postgraduate study abroad. Based on a 50% grant and 50% loan basis. Highly competitive and focused on students who show commitment to giving back to their communities.
award: Full tuition + living allowance (50% grant, 50% loan)

name: Inlaks Shivdasani Foundation Scholarship
description: One of India's most competitive scholarships for postgraduate study at top universities abroad (US, UK, Europe). Covers full tuition, living, and travel costs. Extremely selective — fewer than 20 awards per year across all fields.

eligibility.year: Postgraduate — must have completed UG from Indian institution

award: Up to USD 100,000 covering tuition, living, and travel

name: Reliance Foundation Scholarship
description: Broad-based scholarship program supporting undergraduate students from underprivileged backgrounds across STEM and humanities. Covers tuition fees and provides mentorship and networking opportunities with Reliance professionals.

name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme
provider: Government of India — Ministry of Home Affairs
description: Government scholarship exclusively for dependent wards and widows of ex-servicemen and ex-Coast Guard personnel. Provides financial support for professional degree programs including engineering, medicine, MBA, and MCA.

eligibility.special_requirement: Ward/widow of ex-serviceman or ex-Coast Guard personnel

name: Central Sector Scholarship Scheme
provider: Ministry of Education, Government of India
description: Merit-based scholarship for students in the top 20 percentile of their class 12 board exams, with family income below INR 8 LPA. Covers UG and PG studies at recognized Indian institutions. Renewed annually based on academic performance.

name: INSPIRE Scholarship (Innovation in Science Pursuit for Inspired Research)
provider: Department of Science and Technology (DST), Government of India
description: Scholarship for students in the top 1% of their class 12 board exams who enroll in a natural sciences or mathematics program at UG level. Aims to attract talent to basic sciences and research careers. Renewable for 5 years.

name: Sitaram Jindal Foundation Scholarship
description: Need-based scholarship with broad eligibility across UG and PG programs. Provides monthly stipends to students from low-income families. One of the more accessible scholarships — does not require top board scores, focuses on financial need and merit together.

eligibility.year: Any year of UG or PG

award: INR 500-2,000/month depending on course and category

name: IIT Bombay Summer Research Fellowship Programme (SRFP)
description: Competitive summer research internship at IIT Bombay across engineering and science departments. Students work directly with faculty on ongoing research projects. Provides stipend and on-campus accommodation. Strong credential for graduate school applications.

name: DRDO Summer Internship Programme
description: Internship at DRDO labs across India for engineering and science students. Work on defence technology projects in areas like electronics, aeronautics, materials science, and cyber security. Provides stipend and a certificate of completion.

eligibility.year: 3rd or 4th year UG or 1st year PG

name: ISRO Student Internship Programme
description: Prestigious internship at ISRO centres for students interested in space technology, satellite systems, and aerospace engineering. Work alongside ISRO scientists and engineers on active projects. Highly coveted on a resume.

name: Goldman Sachs Engineering Summer Analyst
description: Highly competitive technology internship at Goldman Sachs for penultimate year engineering students. Work on real financial technology products across divisions. Known for converting to full-time offers. Strong coding skills and aptitude for finance essential.

name: Google STEP Internship (Student Training in Engineering Program)
description: Google's dedicated internship program for first and second year undergraduate CS students, with a focus on increasing diversity in tech. Provides mentorship, real project work, and a strong path to future Google internships. One of the most prestigious early-career programs in tech.

name: Microsoft Explore Internship
description: Microsoft's internship program targeting first and second year students from underrepresented groups. Offers rotation across PM, SWE, and UX roles. Strong emphasis on mentorship and career development. Often leads to repeat internships and full-time offers.

name: ICICI Foundation Scholarship
description: Merit-cum-means scholarship for undergraduate students pursuing engineering or management degrees. Focus on students from rural areas and first-generation college attendees. Includes mentorship and career support beyond just financial aid.

eligibility.preference: Rural students and first-generation college students

name: Narotam Sekhsaria Foundation Scholarship
description: Scholarship for postgraduate study in India or abroad at top universities. Provided as an interest-free loan for study abroad or as direct scholarship for Indian PG programs. Focuses on law, social sciences, architecture, and management.

eligibility.year: Final year UG applying to PG

award: Up to INR 20,00,000 (interest-free loan) or INR 4,00,000/year grant

name: Bharti Airtel Scholarship
description: Scholarship for meritorious students from underprivileged backgrounds at top engineering colleges. Focuses on enabling students at IITs, NITs, and other top institutions who demonstrate both academic excellence and financial need.

eligibility.year: 1st year UG at top engineering college

name: Fulbright-Nehru Master's Fellowship
description: Prestigious fellowship for Indian citizens to pursue a Master's degree at a US university. Covers full tuition, living expenses, and travel. Focus on candidates with demonstrated leadership potential and commitment to India's development.

fields: any — priority: education, public health, social sciences, STEM, arts

award: Full tuition + living expenses + travel (USD 30,000-50,000 equivalent)

name: Commonwealth Scholarship and Fellowship Plan
description: Funded by UK government for students from Commonwealth countries to pursue Master's or PhD at UK universities. Covers tuition, living, and travel. Highly competitive with strong emphasis on contribution to home country development.
award: Full tuition + living allowance + return airfare

name: DAAD Scholarship (Study Scholarships for Indian Students)
description: German government scholarship for Indian students to pursue Master's or research programs at German universities. Fully funded. Germany has many English-taught programs with no tuition fees, making this an exceptional value opportunity.

eligibility.year: Final year UG or Bachelor's completed
eligibility.german_language: Preferred but not always required — English programs available

name: IIT Madras Research Internship (IREF)
description: Summer research fellowship at IIT Madras offering students the opportunity to work with faculty across all departments. Provides stipend and campus accommodation. Strong pathway for students aiming for research careers or IIT graduate admissions.

name: Morgan Stanley Sophomore Internship
description: Technology and finance internship for second year students from underrepresented backgrounds. Designed to build early pipelines into financial services technology. Includes structured mentorship and full-time offer consideration.

eligibility.diversity_focus: Underrepresented groups in finance and technology

name: Swaniti Fellowship
description: Policy and governance fellowship placing young professionals with Members of Parliament and state government departments across India. Focuses on evidence-based policy work. Ideal for students interested in public policy, governance, and social impact.

name: Amazon ML Summer School
description: Intensive ML training program by Amazon scientists and engineers for students interested in machine learning. Not a traditional internship — it's a structured learning program with top performers receiving internship fast-tracks. Highly competitive nationally.

eligibility.year: 3rd or 4th year UG or 1st year PG

award: Free (no stipend) — learning program with internship fast-track for top performers

benchmarks.ml_knowledge: Linear algebra, probability, basic ML algorithms
benchmarks.source: Amazon ML Summer School India 2023 cohort data

name: Citibank Summer Analyst Programme
description: 10-week summer analyst programme across technology, banking, and operations divisions. Students get real project ownership and exposure to global banking operations. Strong conversion rate to pre-placement offers.
